scores.correctness_notes: All three required elements (HTTP health check, custom environment variables, log target) are correctly implemented. Core fields like override, command, startup, on-check-failure, level, period, timeout, threshold, http.url, type, location, services, and labels are all accurate. Additional fields (user, group, working-dir, backoff-*, requires, after) are valid Pebble layer spec fields that go beyond the gold standard without introducing errors.
